title: Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital in Goregaon, Mumbai | 24/7 Emergency Care
heading: Experience the Best Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai – Kapadia Hospital
description: Get 24*7 emergency care at Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai with ✔Cashless treatment ✔Urgent ambulance services ✔latest medical technology and more.

Excellent Surgical Setup 1,10,000 – Patients Served 11320 – Surgeries Completed Successfully 1240 – Complex Surgeries Completed Successfully Advanced Surgery Departments Laparoscopy Surgery Laser Proctology Varicose Vein Advance Surgery Endoscopy / Colonoscopy Arthroscopy Surgery Joint Replacement Trauma , Accident & Emergency Surgery Urology Surgery (Kidney Stone) ENT Surgeries Cancer Surgery Cosmetic Surgery Why Choose Us 35 Years Of Surgical Excellence Highly Equiped Operation Theater Advanced ICCU Unit 24*7 Emergency Trauma & Accident Support Round The Clock Medical and Surgical Support 100% Cashless Facility Available* Experience the Best Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai – Kapadia Hospital From critical care and laparoscopic surgery to orthopedic, laser proctology, laser kidney stone surgery , cancer surgery, ENT surgery, and gynecological surgery , our expert team is dedicated to providing top-notch medical care with advanced technology and compassionate service. Book an Appointment About Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital. Welcome to Kapadia Hospital, the Best Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai, equipped with the latest medical technology. Our expert team of doctors offers a wide range of procedures and services for men and women of all ages. We also provide specialized quarantine ICU wards for critical care. As one of the leading cashless hospitals in Goregaon, Mumbai, we have established strong partnerships with top-tier health insurance providers to ensure seamless and cashless hospitalization. These longstanding collaborations reflect the trust placed in us to deliver exceptional healthcare services. Know More Info. Kapadia Hospital Family Guided by the belief that every life has equal value, this multi specialty hospital provides high quality tertiary medicine care Dr. Rajan Modi M.S, F.M.A.S Dr. Neeta Modi M.B.B.S, DA (Anesthesia) Dr Rahul Modi M.S. Orthopaedics, MBBS Dr. Sheregar MD, MBBS Dr. Dilip Asgaonkar MD(Internal Medicine) Dr Shilpa Singh MD physician (Russia) Dr. Sheshang Kamath M.B.B.S, M.S, M.Ch Dr Anushree Mehta MBBS Dr Shrikant Bodke MBBS, DMRE, FMF Dr Animesh Kumar Diploma in Orthopaedics Dr. Vicky Jain MS MCh Check all Doctors Patient Testimonials Happy patients with their valuable feedback and great experience at Kapadia Multi Specialty Hospital Great hospital for hip surgery genuine and good staff was admitted for a day for hip surgery smooth surgery without any problem surgery done by Dr rahul modi very good doctor and very polite overall experience very good - Carmeline Dias The Doctors and other management team is too polite and coperating and the hospital too is very clean and tidy - Srushti Deshmukh My father was treated for varicose veins. Very nice hospital, very cooperative and polite staff, treatment done properly, Dr Rajan Modi is an excellent surgeon. I would highly recommend this hospital and Dr. Rajan Modi. - Nawal Shaikh I was referred to Kapadia Multi-speciality Hospital by a relative for varicose vein treatment (Laser). Dr Rajan Modi and all his staff especially Pravin Patidar were very cooperative, polite and guiding from consulting to treatment with process for mediclaim (cashless).Overall the experience was great with confidence to recover fast. Thanks for your support. - Claudius Nazareth Excellent short stay experience, both ICU and general ward, for both my parents who were admitted in emergency. Staff is extremely patient and empathetic to deal with the most difficult of the patients. Truly impressed with the staff and facilities. - Atul kabra Smooth cashless provided by Mr. Pravin. Was hospitalized here for 3 days for ambical harniya. The entire staff is extremely polite and caring.Dr. Modi himself makes the patients feel at ease and his entire staff follows the same attitude. Cleanliness at its best. Mr. Pravin help me on the cashless claim. It is very good experience with cashless facility. Food is served for patients and relatives also in reasonable price. Thanks everyone. - Sheetal Deshmukh Was hospitalized here for 3 days. The entire staff is extremely polite and caring. The hospital experience generally is a scary one. However this place does indeed provide care. Dr. Modi himself makes the patients feel at ease and his entire staff follows the same attitude. - Manish Kanchan My mother was admitted here under Dr.Rahul Modi for left total hip replacement surgery which is done very nicely post op my mother is so comfortable and the staff is also very helping Physiotherapist is well experienced Dr Rahul cleared all our questions regarding pre op and post op very clearly. Staff is very cooperative and always ready to help. We thanks to Dr Rahul and Team. Also thanks to the cleaning staff (Mavshi) for maintaining cleanliness throughout the day.. - Sandy Mane My father had operation and admitted here! Really Polite and Helpful staff/doctor/members, you don't have to worry about anything. They take care of you very well. They also provide, Tea, Breakfast, Lunch, dinner which is really healthy.

                                    *Coming to cleaning staff members are actively involved. Administration team do cross verify the work done by the team.

                                    *Room Facilities: Room facilities are advance with new technologies.

                                    *Nurse/Doctors: All doctors/nurses are well qualified and do visit according to their shifts.

                                    It also have cashless claim facility available if you have any medical insurance.

                                    Thanks to team Kapadia - Khushi Shinde My father was admitted here for liver problem this week and treatment went really well !
                                    Good administration co operation especially Pravin has helped me in a lot of communication and has been in constant touch !
                                    Thank you !

                                    Beds are clean and hospital is maintained as well ! - Abhishek Gajji My brother was admitted for Fistula sergery, which turn out to be complicated than expected, but
                                    Dr.Rajan Modi n team took prompt n corrective decision at right time n did the procedure sucessively.
                                    Staff, house keeping n administrative services are very good n special mention of Dr. Bhavya n Ms. Regina for prompt response n patient counceling as and when required
                                    In Nutshell good experience n we wish all the best to entire hospital team... - Heena Gupta Laproscopy Gallbladder surgery of my 85yrs old mother Meena Deo, was done very skillfully n neatly by Dr, Rajan Modi n his assistant doctors n staff. Overall atmosphere n cleanliness of the hospital is praiseworthy.i will definitely recommend this hospital for all laproscopic surgeries. - Jyotsna Pitre I had an issue with spider veins below my thighs. They kept showing and vanishing on their own but the pain is increasing since last six months. So I went to Dr Rajan Modi by reading his good reviews and he really his amazing. When I consulted the doctor with 15 days I got relaxed and relief. - Deepali Pant Dr Anushree is one of the best diabetologist I have ever met, a great guide. She has a very good knowledge. Visits multiple clinics in Mumbai. Very approachable. Highly recommended!! - Dr.Rachana Kamble I appreciate very much the treatment meted out on the ulcer of my left foot. The ulcer is not completely healed, but I am pretty sure with the care and attention I receive it soon will be. Please continue the good work of healing - Stephen Dsouza I am happy and grateful with the operative care given at Kapadia hospital, in line treatment at Wound & Vein Clinic under Dr. Rajan Modi and post operative sitting at Physio-Diagno lounge under Dr. Neeta Modi. The staff is friendly, energetic and supportive. The ambience is pleasant and has a positive atmosphere. I would definitely recommend the services offered at Wound & Vein Advanced Clinic, Kapadia hospital & Physio-Diagno Lounge. - Arpit Kabra I would strongly recommend Dr. Rajan Modi for treatment of Varicose Veins. His treatment is helping my mother to recover fast and with least complications. The hygiene is also at top level at this clinic so you can just visit the clinic without any fear of getting infected. - Atharv paranjpe CLINICAL DEPARTMENTS Kapadia Hospital We are tertiary care hospital with all specialities under one roof performing entire range of diagnostic, therapeutic and interventional procedures. Executive Health Checkup The best way to ensure early stage diagnosis, treatment and cure.
                                Opt regular and complete checkups. Infrastructure Our infrastructure comprises of comprehensive diagnostic systems which enhances the comfort of our patients. Facilities Our facility and services have been engineered around the needs of the patients and society. This will override the registry on DND / NDNC. Please Submit Frequently Asked Questions On Our Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai Does Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital offer cashless hospitalization? Yes, Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital is a leading cashless hospital in Goregaon, Mumbai. We have partnerships with several top-tier health insurance providers, ensuring seamless and hassle-free cashless hospitalization for our patients. What are the specialties of Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital? Our specialties include laparoscopic surgery, orthopedic surgery, cancer surgery, laser kidney stone surgery, laser proctology, ENT surgery, and gynecological surgery. We also offer specialized quarantine ICU wards for critical care patients. How can I book an appointment at Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital in Mumbai? You can book an appointment by visiting our website at Kapadia Hospital or by calling our hospital's reception desk. Online appointment booking options are available for your convenience. Does Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital have ICU facilities? Yes, Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital is equipped with specialized ICU facilities, including quarantine ICU wards, to provide critical care to patients in need. Does Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital offer emergency services? Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency services. Our emergency department is equipped to handle a wide range of medical emergencies, with experienced doctors and advanced medical technology on standby. Does Kapadia Multispeciality Hospital offer second opinions? Yes, we offer second opinions for patients seeking additional consultation regarding their diagnosis or treatment plan. Our team of specialists is available to provide expert guidance and ensure you receive the best possible care.
